Appearances:
Plaintiff Cournale & Co. is present. Represented by Nora Carassco.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jerome Gonzales is present.
Attorney Brendan Radke representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated.
